title: Effects of Tummo Meditation and Niguma Yoga on Brain Activity.

assets.abstract: Hatha yoga, Qigong, Tai Chi, all ancient practices of the mind, continue to be studied and recognized for their mental and spiritual benefits. However, Tummo meditation and Niguma yoga, ancient practices with origins in the 8th and 11th centuries from the Himalayan Vajrayana tradition, remain obscure and have yet to be disseminated and studied. Previously only practiced by Vajrayana monks during a 3-year retreat, practitioners of Tummo and Niguma often report increased mindfulness and emotional
